note: Production JWT signing secret. Must be 32+ random bytes from KMS. Scaffold falls back to 'dev-only-not-secret' which MUST NOT ship.
When '1', allows deterministic dev key for crypto. Tests rely on this; production must leave unset.
Per-request 32-byte base64 content key from client envelope. Real flow needs client-side encryption library + key derivation from passkey.
FastAPI served plain HTTP. Production requires TLS 1.3 reverse proxy (caddy/nginx) with HSTS.
No CORS middleware configured. Add fastapi.middleware.cors with explicit allow_origins for the pastor client app.
No rate limiting on /store or /audit. Add slowapi or upstream WAF.
SQLite scaffold only. Migrate to Postgres and apply docs/RLS.sql before any multi-tenant use.
Column reserved; enrollment + assertion endpoints not implemented.
Device key currently lives in device.key (chmod 600). Production must bind to Secure Enclave / TPM with attestation before key release.
Shamir split implemented; wrapping of Shard B with org pubkey + cloud upload flow not implemented.
Chain is self-contained; periodic notarization (e.g. publish head hash to transparency log) not implemented.
v1 security notes call for Firecracker isolation for AI workloads. v2p ships no AI worker; if added, must run in isolated microVM with no network egress to cloud DB.
